chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-5326 of 2024 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For hearing on CMA No.23566/2024 2.For hearing of main case. 29.01.2025 Mr.Rana Sakhawat Ali, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr.Agha Shahid Majeed Khan, Advocate for Respondent (F.B.R) Ms.Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that this petition may be disposed of in terms that the petitioner shall make an application before the Respondent Department within 03 days hereof and the same may be determined expeditiously preferably within 15 days by the Department after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner. It is further stated that pending aforesaid adjudication the respondent Department may not proceed with the auction. Learned counsel for the respondent Department has no cavil to the aforesaid This petition is disposed of in the above terms. Judge Judge nasir
